from typing import TypeVar, Union

T = TypeVar("T")


def process_data(payload: dict[str, Union[str, int, float]]) -> dict[str, Union[str, int, float]]:
    return transform(payload)


def transform(item: dict[str, Union[str, int, float]]) -> dict[str, Union[str, int, float]]:
    return {k: str(v).upper() if isinstance(v, str) else v for k, v in item.items()}


def fetch_record(record_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    return {"id": record_id, "data": "placeholder"}


def merge_configs(base: dict[str, str], override: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, str]:
    result = dict(base)
    result.update(override)
    return result
